category_sources: source_facts.description says implementation of Relax NG Compact Syntax validator; official repository README says RNV is a Relax NG Compact Syntax validator in C.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title says RNV; source_facts.name is rnv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains invocation and installation notes; source_facts.homepage is the SourceForge project page for RNV.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; GitHub repository describes itself as the official upstream maintenance repository for RNV and contains the RNV source tree and README.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository README identify Relax NG Compact Syntax validation, XML document validation, ANSI C, and command-line invocation.
